outcome_record.event_name: Henley Royal Regatta 2027 — Grand Challenge Cup Final

prediction.pre_match_note: Henley Royal Regatta Grand Challenge Cup (eights). Challenge knock-out format — one race, no second chance. Predicted winner: season best erg advantage (4.2 seconds per 2km — significant). Conditions: 1.2 m/s headwind, overcast — standard Henley conditions.

calibration_flags.notes: Henley challenge format validated. Erg advantage (4.2s/2km) correctly predicted comfortable margin. Challenge knock-out format confirmed as pure performance signal — tactical element lower than mass start. Third rowing calibration record completes initial seed set.
